meanings.definition: people who have possessions and wealth (considered as a group)
examples: only the very rich benefit from this legislation
many fond hopes are pinned on rich uncles

meanings.definition: having an abundant supply of desirable qualities or substances (especially natural resources)
examples: blessed with a land rich in minerals

meanings.definition: high in mineral content; having a high proportion of fuel to air; ,
suggestive of or characterized by great expense
containing plenty of fat, or eggs, or sugar
examples: they kept gorging on rich foods

meanings.definition: marked by richness and fullness of flavor
examples: the robust flavor of fresh-brewed coffee
had ample food for the party
